usage: ecoAddRepeater [-help] { -net <netName> | -term {list of pins} } [ -hinstGuide <hinstName> | -spreadDist <distance> | -spreadCount <number> ] [ -name <instName> | -spreadDist <distance> | -spreadCount <number> ] [ -spreadDist <distance> | -spreadCount <number> ] [ -newNetName <netName> | -spreadDist <distance> | -spreadCount <number> ] [ -loc {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} | -offLoadAtLoc {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} | -offLoadSlack <slack> | -spreadDist <distance> | -spreadCount <number> ] [ -radius <radius> | -logicalChangeOnly | -spreadDist <distance> | -spreadCount <number> ] [ -offLoadAtLoc {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} | -offLoadSlack <slack> | -spreadDist <distance> | -spreadCount <number> ] [ {[-loc {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc}] [-relativeDistToSink <sinkWeight>] [-offLoadAtLoc {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc}]} [ -radius <radius> ] ] [-loc {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} [-bufOrient {R0 | R90 | R180 | R270 | MX | MX90 | MY | MY90}]] [-net <netName> [-spreadDist <distance>]] [{-spreadDist <distance> | -spreadCount <number>} [-spreadPrefix <prefix>]] [-spreadDist <distance> [-firstSpreadDist <distance>]] [-cell {list of cells} ] [ -relativeDistToSink <sinkWeight> | -offLoadAtLoc {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} | -offLoadSlack <slack> | -spreadDist <distance> | -spreadCount <number> ] [ -loc {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} | -noPlace ]

options.name: -bufOrient
options.description: {R0 | R90 | R180 | R270 | MX | MX90 | MY | MY90} Specifies the legalized orientation for the instance

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the name of the cell(s) which is/are to be inserted as repeater(s).

options.name: -firstSpreadDist
options.description: Specifies the distance (from driver) after which the first repeater is to be added

options.name: -hinstGuide
options.description: Specifies the hierarchy in which inst was inserted by ETS/3rd party tool

options.name: -loc
options.description: {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} Specifies the legalized location(s) where repeater (inverter-pair) will be placed

options.name: -logicalChangeOnly
options.description: Specifies that buffer/inverter addition should be done in logical-only mode

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the base name for the repeater to be inserted

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies the name of the net whose sinks are to be buffered

options.name: -newNetName
options.description: Specifies the base name for the new net created for repeater insertion

options.name: -noPlace
options.description: Specifies that the inserted cells should not be placed. Only the logical change in connectivity will be made.

options.name: -offLoadAtLoc
options.description: {xLoc yLoc} | { xLoc yLoc inv_xLoc inv_yLoc} Specifies the location(s) at which buffer (or inverter-pair) should be inserted to drive the sinks downstream from the location(s)

options.name: -offLoadSlack
options.description: specifes the slack (in ns) threshold so that repeaters will be inserted on paths with slack less than threshold

options.name: -radius
options.description: Specifies the radius (in um) in which the added instances are free to move

options.name: -relativeDistToSink
options.description: Specifies the distance value for repeater relative to sink pin

options.name: -spreadCount
options.description: Specifies the number of repeaters to be added for buffering

options.name: -spreadDist
options.description: Specifies the distance after which repeaters are to be added

options.name: -spreadPrefix
options.description: Specifies the prefix used for new instances and nets added during spread buffering

options.name: -term
options.description: Specifies the sink terms to be buffered
